creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
ping:

please update your ports tree, and reinstall devel/poco-ssl and test
spectrum.

Current ports tree installs ImageMagic, 6.7.7.7 which installs:
lib/libMagick++.so.5

need to test with that.

see notes in pr, its important.

test your port with portlint -Nabt

please submit patches against your original shar, in an attachment, 
to:bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
subject: Re: ports/168809: [new port] net-im/spectrum: Jabber/XMPP 
transport/gateway using libpurple
